problem_discovery.title: Problem Discovery
problem_discovery.summary: Backend teams struggle to correlate logs, traces, and deployment changes quickly during production incidents.
key_points: Debugging often requires multiple tools and tribal knowledge.
Teams want faster incident triage and suggested remediation paths.
problem_discovery.raw_text:
Backend teams struggle to correlate logs, traces, and deployment changes quickly during production incidents.
- Debugging often requires multiple tools and tribal knowledge.
- Teams want faster incident triage and suggested remediation paths.

product_vision.title: Product Vision
product_vision.summary: TraceForge is an AI-native debugging workspace that correlates stack traces, logs, release metadata, and past incidents into guided investigation flows.
key_points: Initial persona is senior backend engineers at cloud-native startups.
Product promises root-cause hints and fix suggestions.
product_vision.raw_text:
TraceForge is an AI-native debugging workspace that correlates stack traces, logs, release metadata, and past incidents into guided investigation flows.
- Initial persona is senior backend engineers at cloud-native startups.
- Product promises root-cause hints and fix suggestions.

competitive_landscape.title: Competitive Landscape
competitive_landscape.summary: Existing observability vendors already offer incident workflows, but few provide a dedicated AI debugging surface with code-aware guidance.
key_points: Competitive moat is not yet well defined.
Distribution could be difficult against incumbents with bundled suites.
competitive_landscape.raw_text:
Existing observability vendors already offer incident workflows, but few provide a dedicated AI debugging surface with code-aware guidance.
- Competitive moat is not yet well defined.
- Distribution could be difficult against incumbents with bundled suites.

business_requirements.title: Business Requirements
business_requirements.summary: The team targets self-serve growth but has not validated pricing tolerance or expansion motion.
key_points: No clear plan exists for enterprise procurement or security review.
Revenue model alternates between seat-based and usage-based pricing.
business_requirements.raw_text:
The team targets self-serve growth but has not validated pricing tolerance or expansion motion.
- No clear plan exists for enterprise procurement or security review.
- Revenue model alternates between seat-based and usage-based pricing.

product_requirements.title: Product Requirements
product_requirements.summary: MVP includes trace ingestion, incident workspace, suggested root-cause ranking, and issue export to ticketing systems.
key_points: Product omits explicit controls for validating AI-generated fixes.
Onboarding assumptions depend on customers already having clean telemetry.
product_requirements.raw_text:
MVP includes trace ingestion, incident workspace, suggested root-cause ranking, and issue export to ticketing systems.
- Product omits explicit controls for validating AI-generated fixes.
- Onboarding assumptions depend on customers already having clean telemetry.

architecture_system_design.title: Architecture & System Design
architecture_system_design.summary: Proposed design combines telemetry ingestion, vectorized incident history, code metadata connectors, and a reasoning layer over investigation state.
key_points: Architecture seems feasible but cost assumptions for high-volume telemetry are incomplete.
Multi-tenant isolation details are missing.
architecture_system_design.raw_text:
Proposed design combines telemetry ingestion, vectorized incident history, code metadata connectors, and a reasoning layer over investigation state.
- Architecture seems feasible but cost assumptions for high-volume telemetry are incomplete.
- Multi-tenant isolation details are missing.

ai_agents_ethical_framework.title: AI Agents & Ethical Framework
ai_agents_ethical_framework.summary: The AI layer proposes fix suggestions and incident summaries, but there is limited discussion of hallucination risk or evaluation benchmarks.
key_points: Human review is expected before applying changes.
No rigorous offline evaluation dataset is described.
ai_agents_ethical_framework.raw_text:
The AI layer proposes fix suggestions and incident summaries, but there is limited discussion of hallucination risk or evaluation benchmarks.
- Human review is expected before applying changes.
- No rigorous offline evaluation dataset is described.

operational_resilience.title: Operational Resilience
operational_resilience.summary: The product is intended for production incidents, yet SLOs, on-call expectations, and support processes are underdeveloped.
key_points: No disaster recovery plan is described.
Observability for the observability product is not detailed.
operational_resilience.raw_text:
The product is intended for production incidents, yet SLOs, on-call expectations, and support processes are underdeveloped.
- No disaster recovery plan is described.
- Observability for the observability product is not detailed.

mvp_roadmap.title: MVP Roadmap
mvp_roadmap.summary: A ten-week build plan aims for early design partners and a closed beta.
key_points: Roadmap focuses heavily on core AI experience.
Security hardening and support readiness are pushed later.
mvp_roadmap.raw_text:
A ten-week build plan aims for early design partners and a closed beta.
- Roadmap focuses heavily on core AI experience.
- Security hardening and support readiness are pushed later.

success_metrics.title: Success Metrics
success_metrics.summary: Success metrics focus on engineer time saved and incident resolution speed, but revenue and retention signals are immature.
key_points: Target 25 percent reduction in mean time to diagnose.
No clear threshold exists for acceptable false-positive fix suggestions.
success_metrics.raw_text:
Success metrics focus on engineer time saved and incident resolution speed, but revenue and retention signals are immature.
- Target 25 percent reduction in mean time to diagnose.
- No clear threshold exists for acceptable false-positive fix suggestions.

post_launch_strategy.title: Post Launch Strategy
post_launch_strategy.summary: The post-launch plan depends on community adoption and engineering influencers, with little detail on enterprise buying motion.
key_points: Expansion strategy is not proven.
Customer success coverage is undefined.
post_launch_strategy.raw_text:
The post-launch plan depends on community adoption and engineering influencers, with little detail on enterprise buying motion.
- Expansion strategy is not proven.
- Customer success coverage is undefined.
